title: lindernia spinifida
intro: Lindernia spinifida, also known as needle flower, is a type of flowering plant in the Linderniaceae family, native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Lindernia spinifida include treating fever, respiratory problems, and skin infections, as well as having antioxidant and wound-healing properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
